name: Mandala Roulant
description: Véhicule terrestre dont le châssis est un mandala structurel géant, ses anneaux concentriques tournant indépendamment par champs magnétiques. Aucune fixation physique ne relie ses parties — seule la synchronisation algorithmique les maintient unis en mouvement.
prompt: A ground vehicle with concentric rotating rings forming a massive mandala structure, held together by magnetic fields with no physical connections. Aged steel and ceramic plating, bronze oxidation details. Golden holographic runes glow along each ring. Sci-fi grimdark spiritual art, cyber-asceticism, levitating components, cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
